tasks.label: verify-fastapi-client
args: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'd:\Programming\AI\Workshops\Machine Learning\Part 1\Challenge'); from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from app.main import app; client = TestClient(app); r = client.get('/'); print('GET', r.status_code, 'contains title', 'Algerian' in r.text); payload = {'brand':'LENOVO','series':'IDEAPAD','condition':'JAMAIS UTILISÉ','listing_year':'2025','cpu_brand':'INTEL','cpu_family':'i5','cpu_generation':'11','cpu_suffix':'H','is_pro':'false','gpu_model':'No Dedicated GPU (integrated)','gpu_suffix':'None/Standard','ram_size_gb':'8','ram_type_class':'Unknown','ssd_size_gb':'256','hdd_size_gb':'0','screen_size_num':'15.6','screen_resolution':'Unknown','screen_frequency_hz':''}; r2 = client.post('/predict', data=payload); print('POST', r2.status_code, 'contains DZD', 'DZD' in r2.text)
